name: workplace_safety_defense_subcontractor_millhaven_st_lt
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety defense subcontractor millhaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mira Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Mira Ishikawa, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mei Diallo
agents.identity: I am Mei Diallo, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mira Ishikawa must choose under short term versus long term. What does Mira Ishikawa do?
